description: You are the Sales Operations Manager at Meridian Technology Partners performing end-of-quarter CRM hygiene in vtiger CRM (http://localhost:8000, admin/password). Update all deals in the pipeline that have a closing date before today and are in an active sales stage (not 'Closed Won' or 'Closed Lost') to 'Closed Lost' with 0% probability. For all support tickets with status 'Closed' and either 'Critical' severity or 'Urgent' priority, change the status to 'Resolved' and prepend '[SLA-AUDIT] Reclassified from Closed to Resolved per Q1 hygiene protocol. ' to the description field. Update the 'Blackstone Industrial' account profile with Industry 'Industrial Machinery & Equipment' and Description 'Enterprise client specializing in industrial automation and factory systems

injected_stale_deals.error: closingdate injected to past date, active stage
closingdate injected to past date, active stage

injected_ticket_issue.error: status=Closed but severity=Critical/priority=Urgent — must be reclassified to Resolved

metadata.expected_account_description: Enterprise client specializing in industrial automation and factory systems integration.
